title: An Act to Annually Reimburse the Town of Charleston for 43 Percent of Property Tax Revenue Lost Due to the Mountain View Correctional Facility's Tax-exempt Status
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Feb 3, 2026
last_house_action: 6/25/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
last_senate_action: 2/3/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on Taxation suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION in concurrence
Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
